title: Annual Partners Conference 2024
description: CBI's annual gathering of partners, donors, and stakeholders to review achievements, share learnings, and align on priorities for the year ahead.

title: Community Health Worker Training — Borno State
description: A 5-day residential training for 50 community health workers covering primary healthcare delivery, nutrition screening, and referral protocols.

title: World Water Day WASH Forum
description: CBI hosts a multi-stakeholder forum on the water, sanitation, and hygiene crisis in North-East Nigeria in commemoration of World Water Day.

title: Field Volunteer Orientation — Adamawa
description: Orientation session for new field volunteers joining CBI's food security and livelihoods program in Adamawa State.
